original: The monster before you has been gravely wounded by your timely shutdown of the generator fueling its power. Chunks of its once eerily beautiful body have turned gray and crumbled to dust, unable to hold itself together. Despite this it still crackles with more than enough electrical power and psionic might to take you with it if you don’t finish it off quickly.
You manage to duck under the tentacle, which swiftly returns to its normal size.
The slap connects with a sharp whip crack, sending you briefly staggering before you recover your stance.

The lightning leaves a black scorch mark on the wall as you roll out of the way just in time."+(a?" You have the satisfaction of seeing Janeria lose another one of its smaller tentacles from the power loss and with nothing to show for it."+i:" Janeria seems able to use its lightning with impunity as long as it has the generator to draw on, not even slightly affected by using that much power.")

You feel the searing heat of the electric blast wrack your body as it connects."+(a?" Without the generator, though, Janeria’s starting to pay for using its power like this, losing further chunks of itself."+i:" There’s no sign of this being any sort of strain on it, as the generator instantly replaces all it used and more.")
You just barely manage to slip through a small gap between the filaments before they close entirely, avoiding being tangled.
You find yourself caught in the tendrils. A painful shock wracks your body, accompanied by a draining sensation. It’s sucking out your energy! You’ve been grappled!

Reflexes Save Critical Failure The ice is insidiously chilling, but more importantly the slurry gets into your armor’s joints, locking them up and making it hard to move. Your reflexes are slowed, and it’s hard to aim!
You manage to escape the area just in time, having to shake off a bit of the ice but otherwise none the worse for wear.
The ice is insidiously chilling, but more importantly the slurry gets into your armor’s joints, locking them up and making it hard to move. Your reflexes are slowed, and it’s hard to aim!
Willpower Save Critical Failure The assault leaves you groaning in agony, managing to push Janeria out only after it leaves you feeling like you haven’t slept in days.
You fight back, weathering the storm and forcing Janeria out of your mind with a firm mental shove. Its tendrils quake in annoyance at this display of your fortitude.
The assault leaves you groaning in agony, managing to push Janeria out only after it leaves you feeling like you haven’t slept in days.

At least you’re given the satisfaction of seeing that Janeria’s actions have not been without consequence. The brilliance of its body has dimmed, and the sense of constant growth has stopped. Some of its tentacles have turned gray and cracked like old pavement, crumbling to dust as they fall off.
The psychic pressure roars in fury. You...what have you done?!
You just manage a smirk under your helmet. Time to finish this!
